notes: G5.2.x Phase 2.3 第三闭环;kafka 走 middleware runner(MiddlewareCollectMetrics),extra_payload_keys={"result":True},业务字段经 metric.result JSON 编码。raw_stdout 为形态 B(平铺,无 success/result 包裹),由公共契约 00_common_contract.schema.json 的 oneOf 兼容。kafka plugin field_mapping 实际只取 ip_addr/port/version/install_path/conf_path/log_path/java_*_xms_xmx/broker/io_threads/network_threads/socket_*_bytes,raw 中 bin_path/config/user/pid/cluster_id/broker_count/topics 不在 field_mapping 内,不会进入 CMDB 实例字段
